title: Silent packet drop on re-queue QueueFullError
description:
File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:317-319

When re-queuing a packet after CAD failure, if the queue is full, the packet is silently dropped:

    try:
        self.tx_queue.push(frame_bytes, priority=Priority.ROUTING)
    except QueueFullError:
        logger.error('TX queue full on re-queue after CAD failure')
    break

The error is logged but the packet is lost. This contradicts the TX queue design which uses QueueFullError for explicit backpressure. Upper layers cannot detect this loss.

Fix: Re-raise the exception or return a failure status so callers know the packet was lost.
